name: The Livestock Program
description:
2051. You are a millionaire who is funding a secret project of two scientists. Tired of your bossy and rushy attitude, one of them decides to make you the first test subject of their new device...

Thumbnail image from Bringthefun

Thumbnail uncensored

Original bot unfortunately got permanently privated because moderation mistook the scientists' relationship (who were originally siblings) as incestual and thought the thumbnail was an underage girl🤦
creator: Cat who knows a thing or two
